titleStmt.title: SII 9.473: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 473. (A.R. No. 391 of 1927.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE OUTER PRAKARA OF THE MAHALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1409, Plavaṅga, Kārtika, śu. 5, Ravivāra, corresponding to A.D. 1487 October 21, Sunday, in the reign of Pratāparāya-Mahārāya son of Virūpāksharāya-Mahārāya. It records that, while Virūpākshadēva-Oḍeya was governing the Bārakūra-rājya, Rudrākshi-Oḍeya, the guru of the Seṭṭikāṟas, built a maṭha at the Paḍuvakēri of Basarūr and that the Seṭṭis endowed the maṭha with plots of land. The boundaries of the lands and their annual income are given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ . śrīśarasvatyai namaḥ . śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśira
ccuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti śrī
jayādyudayasālivāhanaśakhavarusa sāvi 1408 saṁdu Oṁbhattaneya varttamāna plavaṁ
gasaṁvachsarada kārtika śu 5 ravivāradalū śrīmaṁnumahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
virūpākṣarāyamahārāyara kumāraru pratāparāyamahārāyarū vijayanaga
(ri)ryya siṁhāsanārūḍharāgi sakalasāṁbrājyadiṁda rājyavanu pratipālisutaṁviha
kāladalli Ā rāyara nirūpadiṁda virūpākṣadēvaOḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanu
pratipālisutaṁviha kāladalli basūṟūra paḍuvakēriyya Oḷage śrīmahādēvara sa
ṁnidhiyali paḍuvakēriyya halaru seṭṭikāṟarige gurustanavāgidda rudrakṣiOḍeyaru
maṭhavanu kaṭṭisi Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi Ā maṭhada dhar(ṁ)mmake barasidaṁthā śilāsāsanada viva
ra Ānegaḷi Oḷage Āgarada catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu dēviseṭiya Aṁṇiseṭi
ya mūlada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalū teṁkalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalū paḍu
valu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalū nāgaṁṇameraṭṭana maṭhada dharmada
śilāśasanada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu paḍuvalu yiṁtī catussīmeyiṁdo
ḷaguḷa hiriyya Āgara Oṁ 1 du ccika Āgara Oṁ 1 du yidaṟa kaṭṭu kaṟike mara pha
la sahavāgi teṁginamara sahavāgi paḍuvakēriya halarū rudrakṣeOḍeyari
ge mūlava koṭṭa Āgarada mēle Ayivara dharma naḍavadu halukaḍiya Oḷage Ā
hitila cattusīmeya vivara muḍalu Ūrōṇiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu yeḷa
da dhareyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu naḍuva Ōṇiyiṁda Aṁṇamuliya hitilagaḍiyi
ṁdaṁ muḍalu baḍagalu jagadārādhyara gaḍi Āṁṇamuliya hitila gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁda Oḷage Uḷa hittilu yēnu Uḷaṁthādu yi maṭṭhake mataṁ māruva gōḷi
ya Oḷage Ā hittila catusīmeya vivara muḍalu narutivabhaṭṭana maneya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍu
valu teṁkalu Agaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Āgaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍalu baḍagalu
keṟeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeya Oḷage Uḷa hittilu Aṁtte yi yeraḍu mūlada
hittilu Oḍeyara maṭṭake muvara dharmake māḍidudu mattaṁ Oḷamāḍina Oḷage nāyi nāreya
dharmada baḷina kaṁṭṭada mēlaṇa teṁginamara rudrākṣiOḍeyara maṭṭake Obana dharmma naḍavadu matta
Udaya tāḷuvana baḍaga tayipāḍiya Oḷage mūli mādaṁṇaseṭiya Aḷiya beṁmase
ṭṭi rudrakṣeyaOḍeyara maṭhake māḍida dhar(ṁ)ma yīcanā biṁnāṇiya maga kēśabiṁnāṇi
subramāṇyabiṁnāṇiya maga sakruṣnabiṁnāṇi yivaribara mūla rudrakṣeOḍeyara A
ruvāra teṁka Aḍaketāṟa Ardda nāghaṁḍugadalū muḍi 2 U hā 2 na Adara kūḍiha
mane ṭhāu teṁginamara phala keṟeya nīru yidara mēlaṇa Ardhadā ba ga 195 hoṁnu
Akṣaradalū nūṟatoṁbhattayidu hoṁnu Idake naḍava Akki nāghaṁḍugalu Akki mu
ḍi hadimūru mūḍi Akki rudrakṣeOḍeyara maṭhake dharmake naḍaudu mattaṁ ku
ṁdāpurada Oḷage koṭṭa Adhivāsada Oḷage muḍi mādaṁṇaseṭiya beṁmaseṭṭi rudrākṣeO
ḍeyara maṭṭaki dharmake māḍidu kiṟiyeṇakāraṁttara maga nāraṇṇakārantara mūlada bā ḷe yera
ḍu muḍiyu mūvattu hāne gadeya Aruvārada Ārdha parivarttanake salū kāṭiga 50 Akṣa
radalu Ayivattu hoṁnu yi bāḷalarddha baṁdarū Urati baṁdarū Oḍeyamaṭṭa
ke matta nāraṁṇakāraṁtara maga kruṣṇakāraṁttara mūlada bāḷu Eraḍu muḍiyu yipattamu
ru hāne gadeya mēle Arddha hoṁnu ga 40 Akṣaradalu nālvattu hoṁnu yī bāḷa
larddha baṁdarū Urati baṁdarū Oḍeyamaṭhake yeṁdu barada śilāśāsana yidake
rudrakṣeOḍeyara Ōppa halaru seṭṭikāṟara Ōppa .
Digital edition of SII 9.473 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
